understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate a grid, change my piece's shape, color, and rotation using modifier tiles, and step onto goal cells once all attributes matched the goal's requirements. I needed to complete all goals in the level while managing stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Moving costs stamina. Walls block movement and are indicated by blocked_directions; trying a blocked direction wastes stamina. Shape, color, and rotation modifiers cycle or rotate my piece's attributes. A goal activates only when shape, color, and rotation all match, and then stepping onto it completes the goal. Losing all stamina costs a life and resets stamina. I repeatedly moved into walls (turns 26-29, 32) and wasted stamina, likely because I didn't check blocked_directions or failed to navigate around walls effectively.
